name: longdo
description: Agent skills for building with Longdo — maps (JavaScript & Flutter), the location REST APIs, and weather.

plugins.name: longdo-map-js
plugins.description: Build web maps with the Longdo Map v3 JavaScript API — markers, clustering, popups, UI, layers, geolocation. For web frontend developers.

plugins.name: longdo-map-rest
plugins.description: Call the Longdo location REST APIs from any language — search/suggest, geocode, reverse-geocode, routing, traffic. For backends and any non-JS client.

plugins.name: longdo-map-flutter
plugins.description: Build mobile maps with the official longdo_maps_api3_flutter SDK — LongdoMapWidget, events, markers, routing. For Flutter/mobile developers.

plugins.name: longdo-weather
plugins.description: Use the Longdo Weather API — rain radar, current conditions, wind, and forecasts. For any language / backend.
